ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Manager of the team */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Coach of the team */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's position */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "batting_average" TEXT /* Batting average of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "ab" INTEGER /* At-bats */,
  "r" INTEGER /* Runs */,
  "h" INTEGER /* Hits */,
  "2b" INTEGER /* Doubles */,
  "3b" INTEGER /* Triples */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Home runs */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs batted in */,
  "bb" INTEGER /* Base on balls */,
  "k" INTEGER /* Strikeouts */,
  "sb" INTEGER /* Stolen bases */,
  "cs" INTEGER /* Caught stealing */,
  "pitch_count" INTEGER /* Pitch count */,
  "era" TEXT /* Earned Run Average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the season belongs to */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "division_description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "game_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "game_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_leagues" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)
